title: Auto Feeder
description: This is a simple mod that feeds any nearby entities.
body:
This is a simple mod that adds a keybinding to feed nearby entities.

Go to `Options` => `Controls` => `Key Binds` and locate the `Auto Feeder` category to set a key bind.

Once set you should be able to simply use the new key bind to feed any nearby entities when holding food.


<details>
<summary>Config Screen</summary>

# General Config
- Mod Enabled - Enable or disable the mod
- Feed Babies - Enable or disable feeding babies
- Feed Adults - Enable or disable feeding adults
- Feeding Range - The range in which to feed entities 
   - The range is in blocks and the area it creates is a cube centered around the player
- Enable Interval - Enable or disable the interval
   - If enabled, the mod will only feed entities every x seconds
   - If disabled, the mod will feed entities every time the key is pressed/held
- Click Interval - Time between the "sets" of clicks
- Click Cooldown - Time between the click in each "set"

# Listing Config
- Listing Mode - Choose between blacklist or whitelist mode
   - Blacklist mode will exclude entities from feeding
   - Whitelist mode will only include entities from feeding
- Blacklist - List of entities to exclude from feeding
- Whitelist - List of entities to include from feeding

</details>
